title: cleisostoma platystele
intro: Cleisostoma platystele, also known as the climbing cleisostoma, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia, characterized by its climbing habit and white, fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Cleisostoma platystele include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Cleisostoma platystele is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
